title: I One-Shotted An Entire App With Claude Fable 5 (Full Breakdown)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates building a video processing app using Claude Fable 5 from only screenshots, completing it in one hour with minimal intervention. He cautions that while the capability is impressive, Fable 5's elevated token burn rate and temporary availability through June 22 create financial trade-offs compared to Claude Opus, recommending builders evaluate whether the speed gain justifies the cost.
writeup: Jordan Urbs builds a video processing app with Claude Fable 5, working from only screenshots and finishing in about one hour with minimal intervention. The breakdown weighs the appeal of one-shot generation against practical costs: Fable 5 carries an elevated token burn rate and is available only temporarily through June 22, which creates a financial trade-off relative to Claude Opus. The takeaway is that builders should judge whether the speed gain justifies the higher spend rather than adopt the faster model by default.
